description: Dreadnaught Breastplate was considered a best-in-slot item for Fury Warriors and Protection Warriors but is also 1 out of the 9 pieces of gear that make up the Dreadnaught's Battlegear item set that became available starting Phase 6 of WoW Classic. While equipped, this item Increases by defense +13, increases your chance to dodge an attack by 1% and improves your chance to hit by 2%. This item is obtainable by collecting the following items for the quest Dreadnaught Breastplate:
name: Dreadnaught Breastplate
